paper_metadata.title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog
paper_metadata.abstract: We introduce GODEL (Grounded Open Dialogue Language Model), a large pre-trained language model for dialog. In contrast with earlier models such as DialoGPT, GODEL leverages a new phase of grounded pre-training designed to better support adapting GODEL to a wide range of downstream dialog tasks that require information external to the current conversation (e.g., a database or document) to produce good responses. Experiments against an array of benchmarks that encompass task-oriented dialog, conversational QA, and grounded open-domain dialog show that GODEL outperforms state-of-the-art pre-trained dialog models in few-shot fine-tuning setups, in terms of both human and automatic evaluation. A novel feature of our evaluation methodology is the introduction of a notion of utility that assesses the usefulness of responses (extrinsic evaluation) in addition to their communicative features (intrinsic evaluation). We show that extrinsic evaluation offers improved inter-annotator agreement and correlation with automated metrics. Code and data processing scripts are publicly available.

extraction_data.innovation: GODEL introduces a three-phase pre-training framework: (1) linguistic pre-training on web text, (2) general-domain dialog pre-training on Reddit comment chains, and (3) grounded dialog pre-training using knowledge-grounded datasets such as DSTC7, MS MARCO, UnifiedQA, Schema-Guided Dialog, Wizard of Wikipedia, and Wizard of Internet. This enables strong performance in goal-directed dialog with high Utility.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Large-scale pre-training on web text, public dialog, and grounded dialog corpora
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Web text, publicly available dialog (e.g., Reddit), MS MARCO, DSTC7, CoQA, Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of the Internet
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Few-shot fine-tuning on goal-directed dialog tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Lack of robust automated evaluation criteria and poor performance of general-purpose dialog models on goal-directed tasks requiring external knowledge
extraction_data.application: Goal-directed dialogue, knowledge-grounded response generation, task-oriented dialog (e.g., MultiWOZ), informative dialog (e.g., Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of Internet)
extraction_data.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

extraction_data.innovation: GODELL extends the GODEL framework with a larger encoder-decoder architecture, improving performance on goal-directed dialog tasks through enhanced representation learning and better alignment between dialogue context and goal states.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (implied from context; no specific dataset named in the provided text)
extraction_data.application: Goal-directed dialogue systems, task-oriented conversational AI, dialogue generation with explicit goals
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning on goal-directed dialog tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog
